rationale: Hard pass for Helix Jump. The archetype is a static anime IP showcase (Ultra Instinct Goku) with no motion, no falling/bouncing/rotating action, and zero connection to the helix tower core loop — mechanic fit is essentially nil and there are likely IP/legal frictions using a Dragon Ball character. Audience also skews to anime/action-RPG fans rather than the broad casual hypercasual base, and the character-centric composition clashes with the game's character-free, geometric minimalist visual identity. Do not greenlight; if the team wants an "epic charge-up" feel, rebuild it natively around a glowing ball smashing through stacked platforms instead.
